messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.definition-scopedown.intelligent-subset-inflation","queries":[{"query":"Grand View Research rack PDU market non-intelligent segment largest revenue share 2025","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"IndexBox Europe Intelligent Rack PDUs market report revenue share of total rack PDU","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Omdia intelligent PDU vs basic PDU shipment revenue split Europe","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.definition-scopedown.europe-30pct-arithmetic-ghost","queries":[{"query":"Grand View Research rack PDU market North America share 38%","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Grand View Research rack PDU market Europe regional revenue share 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"MarketIntelo rack PDU market Asia Pacific dominant region share 38.2%","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.definition-scopedown.colo-denominator-geography-misallocation","queries":[{"query":"BMWK Germany data center installed IT load MW 2700 report","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"EUDCA European Data Centre Association country profiles installed IT load MW by country","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Switzerland self-operated data center installed load MW vs colocation capacity","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.definition-scopedown.stock-vs-flow-intensity-mismatch","queries":[{"query":"CBRE European Data Centre Trends 2025 FLAPD 57% new supply 937MW","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"CBRE 2026 European colocation delivery pipeline CE-7 Warsaw Vienna Frankfurt Amsterdam MW share","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"CBRE Milan Madrid data center secondary market growth take-up 2025","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.definition-scopedown.band-top-contaminated-comparator","queries":[{"query":"IndexBox Europe Power and Cable Management market report €8.5 billion CAGR","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"IndexBox EU Rack PDUs report market value 2025 2026 euro","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Germany rack PDU market forecast $509.6 million 2031","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
